smart.title: Smart Features
smart.tavily_desc: Before the meeting starts, the system automatically searches for the latest information on the topic and injects it to all agents.

model.no_models: No models configured yet. Add your first ↓
model.ollama_hint: Must match locally pulled model name (check with ollama list)
model.url_hint: DeepSeek → api.deepseek.com/v1 · Qwen → dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1 · SiliconFlow → api.siliconflow.cn/v1 · Ollama → localhost:11434/v1

memory.local_desc: Vector data is stored locally (ChromaDB). Persists across restarts. Zero config. Data never leaves this machine.
memory.emb_desc: Converts conversation text into semantic vectors. Recommended: Alibaba DashScope (free 1M tokens/month) or OpenAI compatible.

home.hero_title:
Gather Multiple AI Experts
for an In-Depth Discussion on Your Topic
home.hero_desc: Choose a host and members, enter a topic, and let AI agents engage in a structured discussion and synthesize conclusions.

setup.title: Configure This Meeting
setup.subtitle: Select participating agents and enter the discussion topic
setup.topic_content_ph: Describe in detail what you'd like the AI agents to discuss... (optional)

chat.not_saved: This meeting may not have been saved properly
chat.agenda_feedback_ph: Share your thoughts or ask the host anything...
chat.audience_qa_ph: Ask a question — the host will guide the response...

dialog.leave_desc:
Your progress will be saved and can be resumed from history.
Or continue this session.
dialog.new_meeting_desc:
You modified the host, members, or topic.
Clicking "Start Fresh Meeting" creates a new session.
Your paused meeting can be resumed from history.

agent.name: Name
agent.role_ph: Describe this agent's role, expertise, and thinking style...

alert.name_prompt: Please fill in Name and Role Prompt
alert.model_required: Display Name, Model Name, and API Key are required
